title: cytisus calycinus
intro: Cytisus calycinus, also known as the Scotch broom or French broom, is a perennial flowering plant in the pea family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Cytisus calycinus is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory problems. It can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures or dried for later use in herbal remedies.
